name: Larry Rosenberg
bio: Larry Rosenberg is the founder and guiding teacher of the Cambridge Insight Meditation Center in Massachusetts. He is also a senior teacher at the Insight Meditation Society. He trained in Zen Buddhism and vipassana meditation, and holds a PhD from the University of Chicago. He is the author of 'Breath by Breath' and 'Living in the Light of Death.' His teaching integrates the breath-focused practices of the Anapanasati Sutta with insights from Zen and psychology.
